blocks.body: Strona bierna w Past Simple: was / were + V3.

{ "title": "8. Krótkie podsumowanie", "items": [ "Past Simple Passive ma postać was / were + V3.", "Was używamy z liczbą pojedynczą, a were z mnogą.", "Przeczenie: wasn't / weren't + V3.", "Pytanie: Was / Were + subject + V3?", "Ta forma opisuje zakończone czynności w przeszłości.", "Często pojawia się z markerami czasu: yesterday, last week, in 1990, two days ago." ] }
